headline: PNC Bank Hits Record High, Doubles S&P 500 This Year
summary: PNC Bank stock is up more than double the S&P 500 this year. It hit a record-high share price on Thursday.

headline: PNC Financial to Lift Dividend by 18% After 2026 Fed Stress Test
summary: PNC plans an 18% dividend hike after passing the Fed's 2026 stress test, backed by strong capital buffers.

raw.headline: PNC Financial to Lift Dividend by 18% After 2026 Fed Stress Test
raw.summary: PNC plans an 18% dividend hike after passing the Fed's 2026 stress test, backed by strong capital buffers.

headline: Truist Securities Maintains Hold on PNC Financial Services Gr, Raises Price Target to $257
summary: Truist Securities  analyst John McDonald   maintains PNC Financial Services Gr (NYSE:PNC) with a Hold and raises the price target from $245 to $257.

raw.headline: Truist Securities Maintains Hold on PNC Financial Services Gr, Raises Price Target to $257
raw.summary: Truist Securities  analyst John McDonald   maintains PNC Financial Services Gr (NYSE:PNC) with a Hold and raises the price target from $245 to $257.

headline: PNC Financial (PNC) Leans on Dividend Hike and Stress-Test Strength: Capital Confidence or Caution?
summary: PNC Financial Services Group has recently proposed an 18% increase in its quarterly common stock dividend to US$2.00 per share for the third quarter of 2026, following Federal Reserve and company-run stress test results that kept its stress capital buffer at the regulatory minimum of 2.5%. This combination of a higher prospective dividend and confirmation of capital resilience highlights how PNC is using regulatory clarity to underpin shareholder returns and capital deployment...
